methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran's Gulf strikes and nuclear push dominate regional threat escalation
bullets: Iranian strikes on a Saudi airbase wounded 15 US troops and hit Gulf infrastructure, with Houthi involvement reported.
Militants targeted Kurdish leader Barzani's home in Duhok, Iraq, intensifying security concerns near Turkiye's border.
Sectarian attacks in a Christian town in Syria and 22 migrant deaths off Greece, plus medical staff exodus in Bulgaria, highlight severe civilian stress and border pressures.
